name: Ahmed's App Source
subtitle: A collection of useful iOS apps
description: Apps including RemindMe and Weather Dashboard

apps.name: RemindMe
apps.versionDescription: iOS reminder app with local notifications and CoreData persistence
apps.localizedDescription:
A beautiful reminder app for iOS built with SwiftUI.

Features:
- Create, edit, and delete reminders
- Set date and time notifications
- Mark reminders as complete
- Persistent local storage
- Clean, intuitive interface

permissions.usageDescription: RemindMe uses notifications to alert you about your reminders.

apps.releaseNotes: Initial release of RemindMe - a fully functional reminder app with notifications

apps.name: Weather Dashboard
apps.versionDescription: Real-time weather app with 5-day forecast and detailed weather metrics
apps.localizedDescription:
A beautiful weather dashboard app for iOS built with SwiftUI.

Features:
- Real-time weather data from OpenWeatherMap API
- Search for any city worldwide
- 5-day weather forecast
- Detailed weather metrics (humidity, wind, pressure, etc.)
- Beautiful, responsive UI
- Instant weather updates

permissions.usageDescription: Weather Dashboard can use your location to show weather for your current area.

apps.releaseNotes: Initial release of Weather Dashboard - real-time weather with 5-day forecast
